item.wildhunt.eredin_sword.desc: A blade forged from stellar cold. Never dulls.
item.wildhunt.imlerith_axe.desc: Crushes armor and hopes with a single blow.
death.attack.eredin_1: %1$s fell by the hand of the Hunt King
death.attack.eredin_2: The cold of the Wild Hunt consumed %1$s
death.attack.eredin_3: %1$s turned to ice under Eredin's blade
death.attack.eredin_4: %1$s became another trophy of the Hunt
death.attack.imlerith_kneel: Imlerith fell to his knees. "Cursed... mortal..."
death.attack.caranthir_1: %1$s vanished into the Betweenlands after Caranthir's strike
death.attack.caranthir_2: The Navigator's magic sent %1$s into nowhere
